results.title: IC Electricals IPO allotment today: SME IPO subscribed 420x, GMP rises. Here's how to check status online
results.description: IC Electricals allotment date is likely to be finalised today, July 8. Investors can check your IPO allotment status online through the websites of NSE, BSE and the IPO registrar - Skyline Financial Services.
